steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $h(x)=x+300$. To find $h(40)$, replace $x$ with $40$: $$h(40)=40+300.$$

steps.title: Compute and compare
steps.content: $40+300=340$, so $h(40)=340$. Choice A (‘$300$’) is the starting $300$ without adding the input, while the other choices come from using the wrong operation. B is correct.
